channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 12 dead as a plane on a skydiving outing crashes in Missouri, authorities say
item.description: Authorities say a pilot and 11 others were killed when a plane taking people on a skydiving outing in Missouri crashed in a field and caught fire.

item.title: Skydiving plane crash investigations often reveal poor maintenance and weak safety oversight
Iranian Americans plan protests and watch parties ahead of team’s World Cup opener
